text:
Once upon a long ago...

There was a curious frog. Just a wee little thing at the start. Frog decided he wanted to know about the world. So Frog hopped around and listened. Birds chirped, little girls giggled. And Frog?

Well, Frog thought that butterflies were very charming. That summer there was a lovely butterfly.

Every morning Butterfly fluttered about. Fluttering from red to yellow. And Butterfly loved listening to Frog.

One day, Butterfly was resting and told Frog about herself.

"You think that's interesting," Butterfly said.

"Oh yes," Frog agreed. "And I know something special. I know you like poppies.

So Frog danced around. And sure enough Butterfly did!

After that, every day Butterfly would seek little poppies. Frog showed Butterfly all sorts of poppies.

Days went by. Butterfly became quite adept.

One spring they had a little scare. Butterflies were few. And frogs?

Frogs?

Well, a hawk.

That hawk.
